The Melodious Meritorious Mouse,
    who played a merry minuet on the
    Piano-forte.

title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 70.
content:

title: More Nonsense Limerick 7
content:

title: The Dolomphious Duck,
content:
The Dolomphious Duck,
    who caught Spotted Frogs for her dinner
    with a Runcible Spoon.

title: More Nonsense Limerick 80
content:

content:

title: How Pleasant To Know Mr. Lear!
content:
